myvbgfmodel <- nlme(
  ForkLength_mm ~ vbgf(day, Loo, k, t0),      # Specify model formula
  data = mydata_filtered,                                        # Data frame
  fixed = Loo + k + t0 ~ 1,
  random = Loo ~ 1 | IndividualID, # Random effect for Loo by IndividualID
  start = startvals         # Initial parameter values
)
